title: Coalisina semitetrandra
intro: Coalisina semitetrandra is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Coalisina semitetrandra include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Coalisina semitetrandra is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to relieve symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
